title: Sweet Pea Halal Delight
description: A sweet and fluffy Vietnamese dish featuring peas, dumplings that are halal-friendly and perfect for a romantic dinner.

ingredients.name: 1 cup fresh or frozen sweet peas

instructions: Place sweet peas in a saucepan with brown sugar, salt and water. Bring to a simmer over medium heat until the liquid is reduced by half.
Whisk together egg whites and tapioca flour/cornstarch until smooth. Gradually add warm water, continuing to whisk until mixture thickens slightly (like thin gravy).
Pour pea sauce into egg whites mixture and stir gently until combined. Allow to rest for 10 minutes.

Preheat oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Using a small ice cream scoop or tablespoon, drop pea mixture by teaspoons onto hot oil. Fry until golden brown on both sides (about 2-3 minutes per side).
Drain excess oil from dumplings and serve with a sweet sauce for dipping if desired.
